title: TATA IPL 2025 HLs PBKS v LSG
desc: PBKS posted a massive 236/5 with Prabhsimran's fiery 91 off 48. Despite Badoni's 74, LSG managed only 199/7. PBKS won by 37 runs in Dharamsala to boost playoff hopes.
